actors: Amanda Peet, Brian Van Holt, Jonathan Abrahams
plot: In New York, Brad, Zeke and Jonathan are wolves and best friends. They meet each other once a week together with their married friend Eric to tell theirs dates, affairs and sex experiences along the week. Brad and Zeke are greater lovers and Jonathan loves to self-masturbate. One day, each one of them discloses to the others that has met the perfect girlfriend. Indeed, they discover that their girlfriends is the same woman called Mia. Their dispute for Mia will affect their friendship.
